name: tools.catalog
description: Search all Amprealize MCP tools, including inactive groups, and return exact original names, Cursor-normalized names, input fields, required fields, and activation metadata. Use this instead of reading manifests or guessing calls.

group.description: Optional tool group id, for example work_items, projects, wiki, research, behaviors, authorization.

query.description: Optional search text matched against tool names, descriptions, and groups.

use_case.description: Optional natural-language use case for narrowing tool discovery.

include_inactive.description: Include tools from inactive groups so agents can discover what to activate.
